name: Peoples National Bank Of Kewanee
description_short: Peoples National Bank of Kewanee is a community bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, CDs, and business services with 10 locations across Illinois.
description_long:
Peoples National Bank of Kewanee is a local community bank headquartered in Kewanee, Illinois, with a primary office at 207 North Tremont Street. The bank has expanded to operate 10 facilities and 20 ATMs across the region, serving both individual consumers and business customers. The institution emphasizes personalized, local banking relationships and stress-free service for its members.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including interest-bearing checking accounts (Peoples e-Power Checking with no monthly service charge), savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently offering 9-month CDs up to 3.75% APY), mortgage lending, and consumer loans. Mortgage products include 30-year fixed mortgages (as low as 5.56% interest rate / 5.73% APR) and 15-year fixed mortgages (as low as 5.5% interest rate / 5.785% APR). The bank provides free mobile banking through apps available on iOS and Android, online banking with login access, and business services for commercial customers.

Peoples National Bank of Kewanee distinguishes itself through its community focus, local decision-making, and competitive rates. The bank offers promotional incentives such as a $10 deposit bonus for customers who switch to electronic statements. They provide accessible customer service with multiple contact channels including a toll-free number (866-932-5108), debit card support (833-867-8039), and credit card support (800-883-0131). The main banking office maintains lobby hours of 9am-3pm and drive-up hours of 8am-6pm.

The bank is best suited for consumers seeking community-focused banking with local branch access and competitive rates on mortgages and savings products. However, as a regional institution, it may have fewer technology features and service options compared to large national banks or fintech alternatives. Customers benefit most if they value personalized service and maintain accounts within the bank's service territory.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Free mobile banking (iOS and Android apps)
pros: Interest-bearing checking (Peoples e-Power Checking) with zero monthly service charge
Competitive CD rates up to 3.75% APY on 9-month specials
Mortgage rates as low as 5.56% (30-year) and 5.5% (15-year fixed)
10 branch locations and 20 ATMs for convenient access
Free mobile banking app available on iOS and Android
Multiple customer service channels including toll-free number (866-932-5108)
$10 bonus incentive for switching to electronic statements
cons: Limited to regional service area (Illinois-based), not available nationwide
Lobby hours limited to 9am-3pm (drive-up until 6pm) may not suit all schedules
No information provided about minimum account balances or deposit requirements
Business services mentioned but not detailed on consumer-facing website
Fewer digital tools compared to major national banks or online-only alternatives
best_for: Illinois residents seeking community-based banking with local branch access
Homebuyers interested in fixed-rate mortgages with competitive rates
Consumers prioritizing personalized service over digital-only banking
Business owners needing commercial banking and relationship-based service
diagnosis: Peoples National Bank of Kewanee is best for Illinois residents seeking community banking with competitive rates on mortgages and savings products, backed by local decision-making and personalized service. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this is a regional bank serving primarily Illinois, making it unsuitable for customers outside its service territory or those requiring nationwide ATM networks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
